draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Ms. Lena Volkov, an extraordinary individual who has made significant contributions to the field of AI-driven creative content production and technology integration. As a pioneer in this rapidly evolving industry, Ms. Volkov has consistently demonstrated her unparalleled expertise and innovative approach, positioning herself as a leading force in the realm of generative AI and its applications in filmmaking and content creation.

I am an award-winning filmmaker at the forefront of integrating Generative AI into film, TV, and advertising. Currently, I serve as the Co-Founder and Chief Creative Officer at Fulcrum Entertainment, an entertainment company dedicated to producing original films, series, and new formats in collaboration with top Gen AI artists and storytellers. Our mission is to foster creativity and innovation, captivating global audiences with our cutting-edge content.

Throughout my career, I have been recognized as a leading voice for my ability to seamlessly blend nuanced storytelling with advanced technology. This reputation has made me one of the most sought-after artists in the industry, with top filmmakers and storytellers worldwide turning to me for guidance on this transformative technology. My recent work has garnered millions of views, including the groundbreaking AI-directed short film "Regiment," which focuses on the only Black unit to arrive on Normandy Beach during World War 2. This project quickly captured the attention of Hollywood, with many top directors reaching out to learn more about the technology behind it.

I have also garnered widespread acclaim for releasing the world’s first hybrid narrative genre short, "Others," which combines live-action and GenAI. This innovative project was screened during my keynote presentation at TriCon Next in 2024, further solidifying my reputation as a pioneer in the field. Over the years, I have built a successful career as a brand marketer and commercial director, creating films, immersive engagements, and brand spots for major companies such as Pepsi, TikTok, Hewlett Packard, Paramount, and AMD.

My expertise and insights into the future of filmmaking have been sought after at prestigious events around the globe, including the Berlinale, MIT, Indiewire, Visionary Conference, and the TriCon Film Festival. These speaking engagements have allowed me to share my knowledge and vision with a wide audience, further establishing my credibility in the industry.

I first became acquainted with Ms. Volkov through her groundbreaking work in AI filmmaking, which has garnered significant attention and praise within the industry. Her innovative approach and ability to push the boundaries of what is possible with AI-driven content have made her a standout figure in this rapidly evolving field. As someone who is deeply involved in the integration of Generative AI into film, TV, and advertising, I have followed her career with great interest and admiration.

Ms. Volkov's contributions to the field of AI filmmaking are truly remarkable. Her pioneering techniques and visionary methods have positioned her as a leading force in the industry. Her ability to seamlessly blend advanced technology with creative storytelling has resulted in content that is both innovative and captivating. Her work has not only pushed the boundaries of what is possible with AI-driven content but has also set new standards for quality and creativity in the field.

As the co-founder and CEO of Hyperion, an AI-native entertainment studio and tech lab, Ms. Volkov has made significant strides in the realm of AI-driven content creation. Hyperion, which began operations in September 2024, has quickly established itself as a leader in the industry by pioneering new storytelling methods that leverage the power of artificial intelligence. The studio's commitment to ethical datasets and collaboration with well-compensated artists has set a new standard for responsible and innovative content production.

Under Ms. Volkov's leadership, Hyperion has successfully secured over $50 million in Letters of Intent (LOIs) from major brands such as Oasis, TransGourmet, Hershey, and Sharpie. This impressive achievement is a testament to her ability to build strong relationships with high-profile clients and deliver exceptional results. Furthermore, Hyperion's early content releases have achieved viral success, garnering over 25 million views and receiving global media coverage. This widespread recognition underscores the studio's impact and influence in the industry.

Hyperion's diverse portfolio includes global advertising campaigns, music videos, and TV series, showcasing the studio's versatility and expertise across various formats. The studio's innovative approach has attracted Fortune 500 brands, A-list celebrities, and major film studios, who trust Hyperion to deliver cutting-edge, AI-driven content that captivates audiences and pushes the boundaries of traditional storytelling.

One of the most notable projects under Ms. Volkov's leadership is the groundbreaking collaboration with Falcon Studios to produce the world's first fully AI TV series. This ambitious project has provided Hyperion with a unique opportunity to explore new techniques and push the boundaries of what is possible in AI filmmaking. Ms. Volkov has been a major contributor to this effort, both on a technical and leadership front, showcasing her ability to drive innovation and lead her team to success.

The partnership with Falcon Studios has been a significant milestone for Hyperion, as it has allowed the studio to demonstrate its capabilities in the realm of AI-driven content creation on a large scale. By working on a full-length TV series, Hyperion has been able to experiment with novel methods of character and scene consistency, further solidifying its reputation as a pioneer in the industry. This project has not only showcased Hyperion's technical expertise but also highlighted the studio's commitment to pushing the envelope in terms of storytelling and content production.

Ms. Volkov's technical contributions to the Falcon Studios project have been nothing short of groundbreaking. She has created a radically new pipeline using AI agents, mastered VersatileUI including custom node development, API endpoints, and a proprietary Visual Composer integration. Additionally, she has customized interfaces and developed a proprietary logic/taste layer over existing tools like StarJourney, Clip, Optimax, Flyway, SearchPro, Wind, and more, making them significantly more standardized and powerful. Her ability to leverage these advanced tools and techniques has been instrumental in the success of the project, allowing Hyperion to deliver high-quality, innovative content that meets the demands of a modern audience.

Furthermore, Ms. Volkov has played a crucial role in organizing teams automatically through custom development for Canvas, Communicator, DataGrid, and Creative Suite. Her efforts have streamlined the production process, ensuring that the team operates efficiently and effectively. This level of organization and attention to detail has been vital in managing the complexities of a project of this scale, enabling Hyperion to maintain its high standards and deliver exceptional results.

The collaboration with Falcon Studios has not only demonstrated Hyperion's technical prowess but also its ability to adapt and thrive in a rapidly changing industry. By embracing new technologies and pushing the boundaries of what is possible in AI filmmaking, Hyperion has positioned itself as a leader in the field, attracting the attention of major brands and industry players. This project has been a testament to the studio's commitment to innovation and excellence, qualities that are embodied by Ms. Volkov's leadership and vision.

Ms. Volkov's ability to build and manage cross-functional teams across creative, technical, and business operations has been a key factor in Hyperion's success. Her leadership skills have enabled the studio to tackle complex projects and deliver outstanding results consistently. By fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment, she has empowered her team to push the boundaries of what is possible in AI-driven content creation.

In addition to her leadership and technical prowess, Ms. Volkov's strategic vision has been instrumental in positioning Hyperion as a leader in the industry. Her ability to identify and capitalize on emerging trends has allowed the studio to stay ahead of the curve and deliver content that resonates with audiences worldwide. Her forward-thinking approach and commitment to excellence have been critical in driving Hyperion's growth and success.

Prior to founding Hyperion, Ms. Volkov co-founded and scaled Snapshot, a consumer tech startup that achieved millions in revenue and expanded to over 60 U.S. cities. Snapshot offers free sessions with talented photographers, where clients only pay for the photos they love. The platform now operates in all major U.S. cities, generating over $10 million in annual revenue. As part of the founding team, Ms. Volkov led product, technology, and marketing efforts, designing and coding all software, including high-converting web apps and extensive operational tools.

Under her leadership, Snapshot shipped regular product iterations, achieving a 4.8-star rating based on over 3,000 public reviews on platforms like SocialBook, Searchit, and TripAdvisor. She also spearheaded the go-to-market strategy, managing a $2 million annual ad budget with a return on ad spend (ROAS) exceeding 200%. Ms. Volkov recruited and managed a team of seven to maintain and expand the software, introducing artificial intelligence, advanced scheduling algorithms, and improved security measures. Her efforts garnered media recognition from outlets such as Style, Weekly, Enterprise, and Home Companion.

Ms. Volkov's experience with Snapshot highlights her ability to drive growth and innovation in a consumer-facing tech startup. Her expertise in product development, marketing, and team management has been instrumental in the company's success, and these skills have undoubtedly contributed to her achievements with Hyperion. Her track record of building and scaling successful ventures underscores her leadership capabilities and her commitment to delivering exceptional results.

In conclusion, Ms. Volkov's remarkable achievements and contributions to the field of AI-driven content creation and technology integration are a testament to her expertise, vision, and leadership. Her work with Hyperion and Snapshot showcases her ability to drive innovation, build and manage high-performing teams, and deliver outstanding results across various domains. As a pioneer in AI filmmaking, she has consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible, setting new standards for quality and creativity in the industry.

I have no doubt that Ms. Volkov will continue to make significant contributions to the field and inspire others with her groundbreaking work. Her unique blend of technical prowess, strategic vision, and leadership skills make her an invaluable asset to any organization or project she undertakes. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Volkov, confident that she will continue to excel and make a lasting impact in the realm of AI-driven content creation and beyond.

Sincerely,

Matthew Taylor Co-Founder and Chief Creative Officer Fulcrum Entertainment
